design_philosophy: A playful, high-energy gaming UI inspired by Polytoria and Roblox. Uses Tactile Brutalism with thick, dark borders, sticker-like graphics, offset hard shadows, and high saturation. Built for youth and gamers.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border-4 border-slate-900 rounded-2xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A]
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: bg-blue-600 text-white font-black px-6 py-3 border-4 border-slate-900 rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none transition-all
surface_strategies.buttons_currency: bg-amber-500 text-slate-900 font-black px-6 py-3 border-4 border-slate-900 rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#0F172A] active:translate-y-0 active:shadow-none transition-all
surface_strategies.header: bg-white border-b-4 border-slate-900 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.badges: bg-pink-500 text-white text-xs font-black px-3 py-1 border-2 border-slate-900 rounded-full uppercase

avatar_editor.preview_area: col-span-1 lg:col-span-5 bg-sky-200 rounded-3xl border-4 border-slate-900 flex items-center justify-center p-8 aspect-square relative shadow-[inset_0_0_40px_rgba(255,255,255,0.5)]

catalog_grid.item_card: flex flex-col bg-white border-4 border-slate-900 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A] hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0F172A] transition-all cursor-pointer group
catalog_grid.image_wrapper: aspect-square bg-slate-100 border-b-4 border-slate-900 p-4 relative group-hover:bg-sky-100 transition-colors

daily_challenge_card.wrapper: bg-emerald-400 border-4 border-slate-900 rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#0F172A] relative overflow-hidden text-slate-900

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a playful, neo-brutalist web application. The UI should look like a blocky, tactile game (think Fall Guys / Roblox UI). Use thick borders (border-4 border-slate-900), heavy offset shadows (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0F172A]), and very bright, saturated colors. Headings must be Outfit font, body must be Nunito. Use Lucide icons. 'Brix' currency should be represented by gold/amber coloring. All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Avatar preview area should be sky blue with an inset shadow for a 3D-like display area.
